rationale: All seven dimensions captured with depth comparable to the seed. Industry (logistics/cross-border shipping marketplace/commission model), geography (KR HQ, ops JP, DE; customers VN, ID), and all seven regulatory frameworks (PIPA, KFTC, E-commerce Act, APPI, GDPR, DSA, IMO MARPOL) were user-confirmed. Recurring matters, stakeholders, risk appetite (balanced), and open notes (PSD2 licence, VN/ID data transfer gap) are complete.
